title: Luck Block Time
description: A modpack that gives you and your friends a fun time. The modpack has lucky blocks some quality of life mods and a whole bunch of music discs.
body: This modpack was made for people who wanted to have fun with lucky blocks. There are not many modpacks that have lucky blocks in them. I intend to fuel that fire and give people what they want. Thats what this modpack is, it has lucky blocks, quality of life mods, and a lot of music discs. You can play with friends and mess around and have a great time.
